# יהב אוחנה אינסטלציה (Yahav Plumbing)

> Hebrew-language service-management CRM for Yahav Ohana — a plumbing business specializing in water-leak detection and sewer-line camera inspections in Israel.

The public website is the login surface for the CRM used by the business owner, technicians, secretaries, and contractors. End-customers receive private, token-based links to view or sign individual reports and quotes; those links are not listed here because they are per-document and unguessable.

## Pages

- [Login](/auth): Sign in to the Yahav plumbing CRM.

## Contact

- Business: יהב אוחנה אינסטלציה
- Phone: 054-212-1204
- Services: איתור נזילות מים, צילום קווי ביוב, אינסטלציה כללית
